extracted_json.title: 1.5 Product/Market Strategy (P/MS)

items.text: What differentiates the company's products from its competitors
What markets does the company serve?

extracted_json.summary_topic_line: Product/Market Strategy: defining product differentiation and market segments, illustrated with Cisco.
extracted_json.summary_gist: This page introduces Product/Market Strategy (P/MS) through two guiding questions: (1) what differentiates the company's products from competitors, and (2) what markets the company serves. Using Cisco as an example, differentiators include reliability, security, and quality-of-service to customers. Cisco's market is segmented into enterprises (Fortune 100 companies), Internet Service Providers (ISPs like AT&T and Comcast), commercial (all other companies), and consumers.

transcription:
